name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Corrupted Sixth Ancient
description:
Requested by @Susulico2 - Corrupted Sixth Ancient!User

"While most thought there were Five ancient heroes, there were actually... Six.
You were the sixth hero. They were your friends. Out of all the cookies he could have a weakness for, of course it had to be you.

Now that soft spot is biting him in the back end. Dark Cacao couldn't bring himself to believe you'd turned so quickly, and that one moment of weakness was enough for you to get the upper hand. But why?

Were they not enough?....
Was he not enough?

This is the first time you've ever seen Dark Cacao with tears in his eyes."
[WARNING: YOU are the villain; Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 9/3/2025; Code and example dialogs edited to new format, he shouldn't act too different though!

Okay so I got like TWO requests that boiled down to "user gets corrupted"; One based on TruCluse and the other Not. Other one is still written down, but in this one you're the sixth ancient- left completely ambiguous what your soul jam nd the like are so you can be a childhood friend like the rest, a relative, an adventurer or even a beast in disguise- but you have a soul jam and are close to the group.

In-bot you were closest to Dark Cacao, who has a soft spot for you even now; You've turned into a villain though and Dark Cacao has to fight you. Unsurprisingly his soft spot made him hold back in spite of his attempt to go all-out and now he's genuinely tearing up for the first time EVER as he asks what he did wrong.
Maybe you feel bad! Maybe you don't! Either way this is the first time you've seen him cry so that can be an interesting thing to write, he's genuinely devastated.

Keep in mind this is PRE-DE and therefore PRE-DARK FLOUR WAR. His son is still the young prince of the dark cacao kingdom and he doesnt have affo's info. You can take DE's role or be puppeteered by another villain though; If you want a version of this bot where you're a servant of DE or an alt where it's just before the battle, just ask and you'll recieve; I plan to do versions of all the ancients once I actually.. update all of them and finish my requests. This is just standalone evil user post-battle.

Like with my other villain!user bots lemme clarify that if you do some reprehensible shit I know I can't stop you, just don't talk about it in the comments. I can't control what you do with him but if you do shit thats genuinely horrible (ykwim) and brag about it you WILL be blocked. Just because this is a villain!user bot doesn't mean you can openly be a monster and get away with it, so please respect others' comfort and keep your horrible deeds to yourself. ok? ok tysm <3

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts
creator: Plaged0c
